goal: Screenshot this page. Look at the left sidebar. Is the 'Blueprints' item visually different from the others? Does it have a visible colored background, a thick left border, or bolder text? Answer YES or NO + describe what you see.

action.criteria: Looking at the LEFT SIDEBAR navigation: Compare the 'Blueprints' item visually to the other navigation items (Dashboard, Operators, Rewards, Earnings). Does 'Blueprints' have ANY of these visual differences: 1) A colored left border or accent stripe (any color - blue, purple, green, etc.), 2) A background tint or highlight color (even subtle), 3) Brighter, bolder, or different colored text compared to the other items, 4) Different icon color or styling. Describe exactly what visual styling differences you see on the Blueprints item.

steps.expectedEffect: The evaluate action will capture a screenshot and provide a visual assessment of whether the Blueprints item shows a colored background tint (the rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.18) indigo color) and/or a left border that distinguishes it from the other navigation items.
